results.title: AllSky Free - 10 Sky / Skybox Set
results.excerpt: This is a free edition of AllSky! It contains 10 skies from the AllSky set for use in your environments. ... As AllSky is quite a straightforward asset it should work in any version of Unity.

raw.ec_description:
This is a free edition of AllSky! It contains 10 skies from the AllSky set for use in your environments.

For Built-In and URP Render Pipelines. HDRP does not support skyboxes.


Online Documentation


Skies are provided as 6-sided textures sized from x1024 to x2048 per-side along with an equirectangular texture from 4k to 16k in size. Each version has a material.


Every sky has an example lighting setup scene.


As AllSky is quite a straightforward asset it should work in any version of Unity.

Importing has been tested in Unity 2018 LTS, 2019 LTS, 2020 LTS & Unity 6.

Unity 5.6 can import the sky textures and materials.


Texture based skyboxes render extremely fast. They are suitable for all platforms and specifications.

This is a free edition of AllSky!

It contains 10 skies from the AllSky set for use in your environments.


Provided as 6-sided cubemaps sized from x1024 to x2048 per-side along with an equirectangular cubemap texture from 4k to 16k in size.


Each has an example lighting setup scene.


Please rate if you find AllSky Free useful.


The full version has 220+ skies and is available here.


Online Documentation


- For Built-In and URP Render Pipelines.

raw.ec_description:
A full palette of 220+ skyboxes. Including Day, Night, Anime, Above the Clouds, Cartoon, Fantasy, Hazy, Epic, Space, Mammatus, Sunless and Moonless categories.

For Built-In and URP Render Pipelines. HDRP does not support skyboxes.


Online Documentation


Skies are provided as 6-sided cubemaps sized from x1024 to x2048 per-side along with an equirectangular cubemap texture from 4k to 16k in size.


Every sky has an example lighting setup scene.


As AllSky is quite a straightforward asset it should work in any version of Unity.

Importing has been tested in Unity 2018 LTS, 2019 LTS, 2020 LTS & Unity 6.

Unity 5.6 can import the sky textures and materials.


Texture based skyboxes render extremely fast. They are suitable for all platforms and specifications.


AllSky is a very large asset. It could take time to import the complete set of skyboxes!

Consult the AllSky catalogue in the documentation to find skies you want to import.


A full palette of 220+ skies for Unity!


- Various styles: Including Day, Night, Ghibli inspired Anime, Above the clouds,Cartoon, Fantasy, Hazy, Epic, Space, Mammatus, Sunless and Moonless!


- For lighting artists, environment artists and indie developers looking for a wide suite of skies to light their environments.


- Lighting from day to night: Twilight, sunset, multiple times of day, multiple times of night, skyglow.


- Many weather and cloud types: Clear, overcast, summery, stormy, autumnal, hazy, epic, foggy, cumulus.


- Online Documentation


- AllSky is a very large asset. It could take time to import the complete set of skyboxes!

Consult the AllSky catalogue in the documentation to find skies you want to import.


- For Built-In and URP Render Pipelines.

results.title: Tasty Grass Shader (URP/HDRP 3D/VR)
results.excerpt: The ultimate procedural framework for grass and clutter. ... Flexible ... The skybox used for the screenshots is not included in the package and is sourced from AllSky - 220+ Sky / Skybox Set.

raw.ec_description:
The ultimate procedural framework for grass and clutter. Highly optimized to be enjoyed by cows and GPUs alike.

Tasty Grass Shader is the ultimate procedural framework for grass and clutter. It requires just a single component to cover your terrain or mesh with hundred thousand grass blades. Customizable presets, shaders and textures. Highly optimized to be enjoyed by cows and GPUs alike.


Try the free DEMO!


DOCUMENTATION & GUIDES


PERFORMANCE BENCHMARKS


SUPPORT & CONTACT

If you encounter any issues or have questions, we are happy to help via:

Discord | GitHub | Email


FEATURES

🌱 Powerful procedural generation

  • Scriptable Object-based settings system
  • Use any grayscale texture to control the distribution of parameters, such as: height, angle, bending, thickness, and color of grass blades
  • Up to four customizable layers of variation
  • Several ready-to-use noise textures included.

⚡ Fast and beautiful

  • Separated baking and rendering pass at load time for maximum runtime performance.
  • Renders hundreds of thousands of blades often under one millisecond on a modern mid-range GPU.
  • Control density over distance via template settings and graphics quality settings.
  • Support for Multi-Sampling Anti-Aliasing (MSAA) and Alpha-To-Coverage in URP Forward.
  • See our Benchmarks here

🌬️ Wind and collision system

  • Simple and effective procedural wind.
  • Tweakable wind speed, strength and patterns.
  • Use sphere colliders to make objects interact with the grass.

🌿 Flexible

  • Use custom textures for grass blades.
  • Create your own plants and flowers.
  • Also usable for ground debris, like fallen leaves and pebbles.
  • Slope cutoff control.

🛫 Easy to get started

  • 14 presets for grass, flowers and debris included
  • Several grass textures included
  • 4 wind presets included

⛰️ Support for Unity Terrain

  • Grass can be assigned to entire terrain, a single Texture Layer or painted.
  • Built-in chunk system for optimal runtime performance on large terrains.

🎲 Support for any Unity Mesh

  • Height controllable via vertex color.
    • Vertex colors from meshes supported.
    • Vertex colors from Polybrush supported.

🕶️ Supports 3D (Forward and Deferred) and VR (Single-Pass Instanced and Multipass)


🧑‍💻 Hack-friendly

  • Support for custom rendering materials.
    • Via Unity Shader Graph
    • Via Amplify Shader Editor.
    • Via Shader-Code.
  • API for loadscreens.
  • Independent use from Unity components supported.
  • Endpoints for custom terrain solutions included.
  • Internal API fully exposed.

REQUIREMENTS

  • Support for Shader-Compile Target 4.5, respectively:
    • DirectX 11 feature level 11+
    • OpenGL 4.3+
    • OpenGL ES 3.1+
    • Vulkan
    • Metal
    • (Incompatible with WebGL)
  • Unity 2021.3+
  • Universal Rendering Pipeline 12.1+ or High Definition Render Pipeline 12.1+
  • Burst 1.6+ Package (included with Unity)

KNOWN ISSUES

  • There is no compatibility with lightmaps yet.
  • Compatibility with Unity 6 still being evaluated. Tested with 6000.0.22f1, known issues:
    • (UI) Grass Painting Tool for the Unity Terrain has slightly overlapping text
  • HDRP Support in Beta. Known issues:
    • Motion Vectors don't account for movement by wind.
    • VR compatibility with HDRP not vertified yet.
  • Unity ECS is currently not supported.
  • XR-Passthrough and MSAA are not workling.

FURTHER NOTES

The skybox used for the screenshots is not included in the package and is sourced from AllSky - 220+ Sky / Skybox Set.

This is a sample package of the Village Exteriors Kit.


This handcrafted scene includes a small Cottage, Stables, Fences, Grasses, Ground textures, and the full Exteriors of the Thunder Hammer Forge itself.


The Package is 100% stand-alone, but also the SUPER Companion pack for the interiors that come with the FREE Blacksmith's Forge.


To have the full scene, Interiors & Exteriors all in one, download and install the FREE Blacksmith's Forge to the same project space, grab the PB Thunder Hammer Forge scene file, and install it as well.


The Village Interiors Kit prefabs will snap right in, with the Village Exteriors Kit prefabs fitting like a glove around them.

results.title: Coastal Terrain Collection
results.excerpt: A collection of 20 coastal terrains of various resolutions. These terrains give excellent results as background mountains, and much more! ... All sky boxes used were from the AllSky asset.

raw.ec_description:
A collection of 20 coastal terrains of various resolutions. These terrains give excellent results as background mountains, and much more!

Features:
- 20 Detailed terrain meshes which can be scaled, rotated, and flipped for whatever scenario needed.
- 4 different resolutions for each terrain (128k triangles, 64k, 32k, and 16k). You are guaranteed to find something to fit your performance needs!
- A 4096x4096 diffuse texture and 2048x2048 normal map for each terrain mesh.
- Demo scene for each terrain, all with mesh colliders.

Package does not include the sky boxes shown in screenshots. All sky boxes used were from the AllSky asset.

Any questions about the package? Be sure to send me an email!

results.title: Grassland Terrain V2
results.excerpt: This grassland terrain features a high mountain range grassland. ... - Eight terrain textures and normal maps for use with the unity terrain. ... All sky boxes used were from the AllSky asset.

raw.ec_description:
A simple grassland terrain created using external tools, brought into the Unity game engine. This grassland terrain features a high mountain range grassland.

Features:
- 1 Detailed terrain mesh which can be scaled, rotated, and flipped for whatever scenario needed. Default terrain size is 5000m x 5000m.
- 5 different resolutions for the terrain mesh (128k triangles, 64k, 32k, 16k, and 4k).
- A 2048x2048 diffuse texture and 2048x2048 normal map for the terrain mesh.
- A fully textured, fully editable unity version of the grassland terrain.
- A high resolution, medium resolution, and low resolution version for the unity terrain.
- Eight terrain textures and normal maps for use with the unity terrain.

Read Below

This package includes a unity terrain version with high quality textures. This would serve as excellent use in first person and third person games, as it looks great close up. The mesh terrain included looks great from a distance, so you would find excellent use for it as background mountains or for a sky-view game.

For mobile games, the terrain mesh could be used due to the extremely low resolution version included.

Package does not include the sky boxes shown in screenshots. All sky boxes used were from the AllSky asset.

Any questions about the package? Be sure to send me an email!

raw.ec_description:
These ruins are based off of the etruscans. An enigmatic culture that came before the romans. It contains a wide variety of pieces like stone ruins, wood structures, nature and props to create scenes with an ancient motif.

Features:
- 217 models with over 75 ruin pieces to build from using PBR materials.
- Demo scene with a terrain with grass setup and a layout scene.
- 2048x2048 textures and FBX models.

Polycount examples:
- Dead Tree: 3500 triangles (LOD0)
- Vines straight: 3130 triangles
- Necropolis building A: 256 triangles
- Stairs tilted right: 2116 triangles
- Pillar piece: 996 triangles
- Pillar marble: 1168 triangles
- Lantern: 2542 triangles

Notes:
- Screenshots taken with post-process.
- Screenshots use AllSky Free
- Some of the prefabs might not contain LOD setup or adequate colliders.

Email │ Discord │ Facebook

Modular grid-based Construction Kit with pre-assembled prefabs for fast creation stages with a "One Thousand and One Nights" vibe.

* 101 unique prefabs: arcade, balcony, bridge, ceiling, floor, columns, grids, stair, wall

- floor ( 2048x2048 tileable): albedo, occlusion, normal, metalness/roughness and RGB mask for HDRP

- metal ( 2048x2048 tileable): albedo

- 2 trim sheets decorations ( 2048x2048 horizontal tileable): albedo, occlusion, normal, metalness/roughness and RGB mask for HDRP

results.title: Python Mini Map
results.excerpt: Looking for a low cost mini map solution for your game or project? ... -Prefab for main controller ... -Support for U GUI and NGUI AllSky Free Skyboxes used in examples. Get it free here.

raw.ec_description:
Looking for a low cost mini map solution for your game or project? Well, look no further. The Python Mini Map is light weight, fast, and simple to get going. However, if you require flexibility to change the setup easily between scenes, then we have you covered as well. Python MM supports using your own static picture, but will also work without one for those who want to handle things on the fly. You can configure it how you like. Want to add new markers and entities to your game? No problem. Making a 2D game and need a mini map? We have you covered!

Need help? We'll be there to assist if you're having problems. Give the Python Mini Map a serious look!

What's included:
-Prefab for main controller
-Prefabs for 2D game use.
-Prefabs for entity markers (just drag them into your scene and change graphic to whatever you like)
-Example scenes
-Instructions on how to get started
-Support for U�GUI and NGUI


AllSky Free Skyboxes used in examples. Get it free here.


Questions: Visit our Unity forum thread!

results.title: sFuture Modules PRO Space and Ground
results.excerpt: Future modules is a extreme low poly building system. ... The space ship is an example of what you can do, the asset beautify is used for bloom effect and asset allsky for the background.

raw.ec_name: sFuture Modules PRO Space and Ground
raw.ec_description:
Does not require Untiy PRO.

Future modules is a extreme low poly building system.

On super promotion!!!

Due to low update rate its now free for all...

You can make a spaces station or a ground base for any type of game with a futuristic style.

25 models and 66 textures that you can combine to infinity.

Albedo, emission, heigthmap, normalmap, occlusion and specular maps included for all materials.

Mobile and next gen desktop quality.

You can use the same materials on all models. No need for extra textures for diffrent shapes.

Poly count main building panel: 20 polys all the bling bling is textured!!!

You can build anything you want with extreme performance and modular builds. Without compromising the quality.

I who have designed the build system are a Lego, Minecraft and Sci-Fi fan with a irl history from industry design before i took a interest in game design. Many hours planning and reworking are invested in the "simplicity" behind the models and texture UWV layout.

This pro version is reworked from the ground up with new UVW setup. You can use the free sFuture Modules together with pro but use the models from each pack with their own materials.

The space ship is an example of what you can do, the asset beautify is used for bloom effect and asset allsky for the background.

I will continue to develop the design, so if you have any wishes feel free to e-mail me.

results.title: Aurora Cinematic Volumes & Lighting
results.excerpt: Beautiful URP toolkit with dynamic post-processing volumes, cinematic cutscene ... https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/textures-materials/sky/allsky-220-sky-skybox-set-10109 ... Soghoxal

raw.ec_description:
Beautiful URP toolkit with dynamic post-processing volumes, cinematic cutscene presets, minimap profiles, lighting setups, and full URP renderer features - URP Required

Key Features

Complete URP Volume Library

  • A wide range of preconfigured URP Volume profiles: cinematic, realistic, stylized, dark, bright, sci-fi, low-contrast, atmospheric, and more
  • Optimized for clarity, performance, and flexible usage across scenes
  • Perfect for gameplay, cutscenes, UI overlays, and minimaps

Dynamic Volume Switcher (Included Script)

  • Switch between volume profiles seamlessly at runtime.
  • Supports smooth blending, instant switching, and state-based transitions.
  • Ideal for dynamic atmospheres, storytelling, and filmed sequences.

Cinematic Demo Scene

  • A professionally assembled scene to showcase the toolkit’s full potential
  • Includes lighting presets, volume switching, minimap setup, and a demo cutscene
  • Perfect as a prototype base or a visual reference for your pipeline

Cutscene & Minimap Presets

  • Ready-to-use minimap profiles that are clear, optimized, and scalable
  • Dedicated cinematic profiles designed to deliver a rich, film-like look
  • Fine-tuned URP post-process settings including bloom, exposure, vignette, and more

Lighting Configuration Pack

  • Fully crafted light setups for indoor/outdoor environments.
  • Presets include soft light, hard directional setups, evening, night, ambient-rich, and more
  • Clean, noise-free lighting styles ready for production

Complete URP Renderer Feature Set

  • Custom tone mapping, Etc..URP Renderer assets fully configured with advanced Render Features:
    Advanced Bloom
    Depth & Normal extraction
    Screen-space effects
    Custom blit passes
  • Import and use instantly

Skybox Collection

  • A curated selection of skyboxes integrated into the demo scene
  • (Skyboxes originate from third-party free assets; properly referenced.)Ideal for quick prototyping or mood exploration
  • https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/2d/textures-materials/sky/allsky-220-sky-skybox-set-10109

Technical Details

Scripts Included

  • VolumeSwitcher: Manages runtime transitions and blending
  • VolumeGroup: Organizes groups of visual profiles
  • MinimapProfileLoader: Dynamically swaps minimap setups
  • CutsceneProfileLoader: Loads cinematic profiles during events

Optimized Project Structure

  • Clean folder layout for volumes, lighting, renderer assets, and tools
  • Fully commented, modular scripts designed for scalability
  • Includes detailed documentation and usage notes

Prefabs & Tools

  • Prefabs for URP-ready cameras (without using Camera.main), minimaps, volumes, and lighting rigs
  • Custom creation menu entries for fast integration
  • Complete URP renderer preset included

Compatibility

  • Built and optimized for Unity 2021.3.32f1 (URP).
  • Ideal for 3D, 2.5D, and 2D projects that rely on post-processing (minimaps, overlays)
  • Scalable for PC, mobile, and VR-friendly pipelines.

Includes

  • 10+ URP Volume Profiles
  • 2 Primary Scripts (SceneTester [Volume Switcher], LiftGammaGainController)
  • Full URP Renderer + Render Features
  • Polished Demo Scene
  • Lighting Preset Library
  • Minimap & RenderTextures for Cutscenes

Soghoxal

Master Your Visual Pipeline with Cinematic URP Control

Boost your Unity 2021.3.32f1 projects with a complete, production-ready toolkit designed to refine every aspect of your URP visuals. From cinematic cutscenes to clean minimaps, atmospheric lighting setups, and dynamic post-processing volumes, this package provides all the essential tools to create polished, coherent, and professional environments


Whether you're crafting narrative sequences, stylized worlds, or high-quality prototypes, Aurora Cinematic Volumes & Lighting gives you full control over lighting, rendering, transitions, and overall mood — all while keeping your workflow simple and efficient

results.title: Low Poly Nature: Lush and Diverse Environments

raw.ec_name: Low Poly Nature: Lush and Diverse Environments
raw.ec_description:
Bring your game to life with over 800 low poly 3D models. Inspired by real-world flora, discover a diverse range of models to craft your dream world.

Number of textures: 4

Texture dimensions: 512x512

Polygon count: 2-4500

Minimum polygon count: 2

Maximum polygon count: 4500

Number of meshes/prefabs: 808

Rigging: No

UV mapping: Yes

Types of materials and texture maps: texture palette/texture atlas

🍃 Welcome to the Low Poly Nature Pack!


Ever dreamt of creating a lush, vivid game world but not sure where to start? Say hello to the Low Poly Nature pack, the ultimate asset toolkit designed with you in mind.


🌳 What’s Inside?


Over 800 High Quality Game Ready 3D Models: From whimsical mushrooms to towering oaks, everything you need to paint a vivid picture. Ideal for desktop and mobile.

  • Flora: Bushes & shrubs, grass blades & lumps, mushrooms & more.
  • Terrain: A wide range of ground pieces, including background mountains and floating islands.
  • Props: Add life with campfires, ruined walls and modular fences.
  • Geological Features: Rocks, pebbles, and cliffs.
  • Stunning Trees: From majestic oaks to whimsical weeping willows.

🎨 Customization:


Aside from provided variations inside the pack it is very easy to customize colors due to the usage of single texture atlas / palette texture. Annotated variant of the pallete texture is provided.



✨ Unique Features:

  • Real-World Inspiration: Many of the models aren't just generic plants; we strived for biological accuracy, while still maintaining low poly aesthetics and artistic freedom. This includes different growth stages for some of the models.
  • Ready-to-Use: Dive in with an overview map and ready to use drag&drop prefabs. Witness the potential before you even begin.
  • Unity Optimized: Supports BultIn, URP, and HDRP rendering pipelines. Primitive colliders are provided for most of the models (and generated convex mesh colliders for some).

🔍Details:

  • Bushes: 40, including 15 shrubs
  • Cliffs: 5
  • Grass: 80 models, including more and less detailed version, with variations (lush, dried, mixed)
  • Ground: 69 models, including Background Mountains (5), Flat 4m tiles (20), Floating Islands (6), Low Hills (6), Mounds (16) and Small piles (16)
  • Mushrooms: 83 models, including Death Caps (1), Fly Agaric (22), Girolles (9), Parasol Mushrooms (13), Procini (12), Shaggy Ink Cap (15) and generic mushrooms (2)
  • Plants: 196 models, including Bluebells (9), Daisies (15), Dandelions (13), Ferns (13), Foxgloves (9), Ivy (52: 20 complex, 20 simplified variants and 10 clusters, and 2 leaves), Nettles (36), Reeds (9), Water Lilies (22) and Wild Garlic (12), generic saplings (6)
  • Rocks: 35 models, including 9 rock piles
  • Simple water planes: 15 models of tillable meshes
  • Trees: 110 models, including Birches (18), Oaks (17), Pines (51), Weeping Willow (14), generic trees (10)
  • Tree branches: 13 models
  • Tree logs: 42 models, including log piles (12)
  • Tree trunks/stumps: 19 models
  • Tree roots: 6 models
  • Withered Trees: 15 models
  • Modular fence: 50 models
  • Campfires: 10 models (2 types of campfires in 3 stages, firewood and stone)
  • Ruined walls: 13 models, including 6 walls, 2 rubbles and 5 stone slabs
  • Planks: 7 models
  • Textures: 4 variants of palette texture (baseline, vibrant, toned down, flat)

Start crafting your dream game today. Let the Low Poly Nature pack be your guide, brush, and canvas all rolled into one.


Engage with us! If you have ideas or feedback join our discord community or write to us!


⚠️Note: this pack includes 3D models, prefabs, scenes, materials, and textures. Effects, water shaders, and volumetrics from videos and screenshots are excluded. Most notably see Volumetric Fog and Mist 2 by Kronnect and URP Stylized Water Shader - Proto Series by Bitgem and skyboxes from 'AllSky' by rpgwhitelock. "ForestPath" demo scenes is very CPU demanding and it was desgined with GPU Instancer by GurBu Technologies or similar solution in mind. Please note, GPU Instancer is NOT included in the asset pack, but the dense grass is available (disabled) for those with a similar tool. All screenshots are from URP. Overview images remain unaltered without post-processing or special effects.

raw.ec_description:
A curated set of 62 3D low-poly models inspired by real flora. Perfect for indie devs, it enhances projects with botanical elements and props, laying a foundation to ignite creativity.

Number of textures: 1

Texture dimensions: 512x512

Polygon count: 32-1612

Minimum polygon count: 32

Maximum polygon count: 1612

Number of meshes/prefabs: 62

Rigging: No

UV mapping: Yes

Types of materials and texture maps: texture palette/texture atlas

🍃 Welcome to Low Poly Nature: Essentials!


Introducing the distilled essence of our comprehensive Low Poly Nature pack – a handpicked selection designed to give you a taste of the wonders that await. Ideal for indie developers, hobbyists, or anyone keen on dipping their toes into the lush landscapes of low-poly designs.


🌳 What’s Inside?


62 Curated High-Quality 3D Models: A delightful mix from our full pack, featuring everything from serene grass blades to sturdy tree trunks. Experience the magic without the commitment. Great for mobile, VR or desktop.


✨ Key Features:

  • Quality Assured: Just like our full pack, every model in this Essentials kit is meticulously crafted, adhering to the industry standards.
  • Botanical Inspiration: Dive into models inspired by real-world plants, combining precision and low-poly aesthetics.
  • Simple Customization: Just as with our comprehensive pack, enjoy easy color swapping with a single texture atlas/palette texture.

The pack contains 62 models: 2 bushes, 3 grass clusters, 7 ground elements, 8 mushrooms, 12 plants, 5 rocks, and 17 tree-related models. Additionally, it includes 2 fences, a ruined wall, some rubble, a campfire, log piles, and 2 planks.


Kickstart Your Vision: This pack isn't just about offering models; it's about sparking creativity. Use it as a foundation to envision what’s possible with our full range.


Engage with us! If you have ideas or feedback join our discord community or write to us!


Low Poly Nature: Essentials - Your first step into a world of vibrant creativity. Don't just take our word for it, try it out for yourself!


And if you find yourself craving more intricate details and diversity, look no further. Dive into the vast landscapes of our comprehensive Low Poly Nature: Lush and Diverse Environments!


⚠️Note: this pack includes 3D models, prefabs, scenes, materials, and textures. Effects, water shaders, and volumetrics from videos and screenshots are excluded. Most notably see Volumetric Fog and Mist 2 by Kronnect and URP Stylized Water Shader - Proto Series by Bitgem and skyboxes from 'AllSky' by rpgwhitelock. All screenshots, except one, are from URP.

results.excerpt: With an oscillation system of your flashlight to recreate a more real movement of ... It was used in the scene demo 2 free assets: AllSky Free - 10 Sky / Skybox Set First Person All-in-One

raw.ec_description:
An advanced and customizable Flashlight system. New Update , now too have a Runic Cube that illuminates, perfect for fantasy games.

An advanced and customizable

Flashlight system.


Where the intensity of the light depends on the charge of the battery.


With an oscillation system of your flashlight to recreate a more real movement of your flashlight.


It also includes the sound system. Turn on, turn off, recharge the flashlight and collect the batteries. You can choose if your flashlight has infinite energy or if it will wear out over time. The possibility of recharging it with batteries. The ability to slowly self-recharge when the battery runs out. An interface which changes its intensity when your batteries run out. All this easily configurable and customizable with a drag and drop system. Without having to program anything. I already programmed for you about 350 programming lines to make it as easy and customizable for the user.



The demo scene is in the universal render pipeline.


It was used in the scene demo 2 free assets: AllSky Free - 10 Sky / Skybox Set First Person All-in-One


Includes: 1x 3D Model Low poly Flashlight 1x 3D Model Battery low poly 1x 3D Model Radio low poly 2x Script 2x Flashlight Icons 4x Sounds 1x Demo Song 2x Prefab (Player with flashlight and batteries)


Web


Web Support


Email

results.title: UWS 2 : Universal Water System 2 For URP & Mobile Ready
results.excerpt: - Implemented without tessellation, based on Mesh LOD. ... - Shoreline shapes are dynamically generated and animated based on spline curves, ... 2.AllSky Free under Asset Store EULA License;

raw.ec_name: UWS 2 : Universal Water System 2 For URP & Mobile Ready
raw.ec_description:
UWS 2 offers features such as an infinite water surface, FFT Waves, editable shorelines, dynamic breaking waves, underwater effects, and supports PC and Mobile platforms.

1. **Infinite Water Surface:**

- Implemented without tessellation, based on Mesh LOD.

2. **Dynamic FFT Calculations:**

- Three-layer FFT calculations.

- Adjustable parameters for local and swell waves.

3. **Reflection and Refraction:**

- Planar reflection and refraction for realistic water rendering.

4. **Editable Shorelines:**

- Shoreline shapes are dynamically generated and animated based on spline curves, including the dynamic control of breaking waves.

5. **Underwater Effects and Waterline:**

- Water distortion, caustics, and volumetric lighting, the transition between the upper and lower water areas.

6. **Foam Effects:**

- Implements foam and contact foam for added visual realism.

7. **Water Physics Interaction:**

- Includes buoyancy for realistic water physics.

- Ripples

- Wake Foam

8. **Dynamic Boat Control:**

- Simple boat dynamics control for interactive experiences.

9. **Cross-Platform Support:**

- Optimized for both mobile and desktop platforms.

- Demonstrated excellent performance on Snapdragon 870 in a mobile demo, maintaining a full frame rate under a 60 fps frame rate cap.

🌊 **Immerse in Realism**: Bring lifelike aquatic environments to your Unity projects with the UWS 2. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced developer, this comprehensive package delivers unmatched water rendering capabilities.


🎮 **Compatibility**: The system is optimized for pc and mobile.


*UWS2 has been adapted for Unity 6. If your project is upgraded from a lower version to Unity 6, please turn off the Render Graph compatibility mode.


*When importing an asset for the first time, you can use the pipeline asset at the following path: Assets/TechFusion/UniversalWaterSystem2/Demos/PipelineAsset/URP-HighFidelity.asset


Naval Battle Kit's water system utilizes the infinite water surface and FFT Waves features from UWS 2.


🌟 Key Features

1. Infinite Water Surface

Transform your scenes with an expansive and visually stunning infinite water surface. Utilize advanced Mesh LOD techniques for optimal performance without relying on tessellation.

2. Dynamic FFT Calculations

Engage users with dynamic three-layer FFT calculations. Precisely control local and swell wave parameters to achieve a level of realism tailored to your project.

3. Reflection and Refraction

Immerse players in realistic environments with planar reflection and refraction. Enhance the overall visual fidelity of your water rendering for an immersive experience.

4. Editable Shorelines with Dynamic Breaking Waves

A guideline editor is provided to control the shape of the shoreline, and at runtime, these guidelines are used to generate a dynamic shoreline based on a spline. The shoreline's wave supports dynamic control of breaking waves.

5. Underwater Effect and Waterline

Underwater effects include water distortion, caustics, and volumetric lighting. The waterline represents the boundary between the above-water and underwater areas.

6. Foam Effects

Bring water to life with detailed foam and contact foam effects. These visual elements contribute to an authentic representation of water dynamics, enhancing the overall user experience.

7. Water Physics Interaction

Simulate realistic water physics with the integrated buoyancy system. Enable dynamic interactions between objects and the water surface for a more immersive experience.The demo showcases objects hitting the water surface, creating splashes and ripples. As the ship sails, it generates wakes and foam.

8. Dynamic Boat Control

Introduce responsive boat dynamics with a straightforward control system. Facilitate the creation of interactive experiences involving watercraft, opening up new possibilities for gameplay and storytelling.

9. Cross-Platform Support

Optimize your project for both mobile and desktop platforms. The UWS 2 demonstrates outstanding performance, maintaining a full frame rate on mobile devices like Snapdragon 870, even under a 60 fps frame rate cap.


🚀 **Ideal For**

- **Action-packed Adventures:** Create thrilling water-based sequences for dynamic gameplay.

- **Serene Simulations:** Craft tranquil and realistic aquatic environments for serene simulations.

- **Strategic Naval Games:** Develop strategic naval games with realistic water rendering and physics.

Dive into the possibilities of creating visually stunning and engaging water experiences across a variety of genres with the UWS 2 for URP.


Asset uses:

1. Colonial Ship under Asset Store EULA License;

2.AllSky Free under Asset Store EULA License;

3.Rock and Boulders 2 under Asset Store EULA License;

see Third-Party Notices.txt file in package for details.

results.title: Naval Battle Kit
results.excerpt: Elevate your PC & Mobile Unity projects with realistic ocean rendering, dynamic ship ... Pre-built sailing scenes and AI battle scenarios. ... 6.AllSky Free under Asset Store EULA License;

raw.ec_description:
Embark on a voyage of intense naval warfare with the Naval Battle Kit. Elevate your PC & Mobile Unity projects with realistic ocean rendering, dynamic ship dynamics, and strategic AI-driven battles.

Ocean Rendering System:

  • Three-layer FFT ocean waves.
  • Unlimited Ocean LOD Mesh.
  • Reflection, refraction, absorption, subsurface scattering, and foam rendering.
  • Dynamic water effects: ship-generated waves, foam, splashes, and ripples.
  • Wind-driven waves with automatic calculation based on wind strength.

Platform Support:

  • Efficient performance on both PC and mobile platforms.

Ship Dynamics and Combat:

  • Buoyancy calculations and propulsion system for realistic ship movement.
  • Dynamic and efficient sail and rigging system, offering control over ropes and pulleys, sail furling, as well as the fully drawing effect.
  • Physics-based cannon projectiles with realistic ballistic trajectories.
  • AI Behavior Tree System for intelligent opponent behavior.

Visualization and Scenes:

  • Dynamic health bars based on damage values.
  • Pre-built sailing scenes and AI battle scenarios.

Experience the epic grandeur of naval warfare with the Naval Battle Kit, a robust Unity asset meticulously crafted for developers seeking an unparalleled maritime simulation. Immerse your players in the dynamic world of oceanic combat, featuring a sophisticated Ocean Rendering System that encompasses real-time FFT ocean waves, unlimited Ocean LOD Mesh, and a suite of effects including reflection, refraction, absorption, subsurface scattering, and foam rendering.


Demo(Windows)


🌊Ocean Rendering System:Witness the realism of three-layer FFT ocean waves that dynamically respond to wind strength, creating an ever-changing seascape. The Ocean LOD Mesh ensures seamless transitions between calm waters and tumultuous waves, enhancing the authenticity of your maritime environments.


The Naval Battle Kit includes the features of the Universal Water System, so you don't need an additional water system.


🚢Ship Dynamics and 💥Combat:Take command of naval vessels with a cutting-edge ship dynamics system, where buoyancy calculations and a propulsion system work in harmony to deliver lifelike ship movement. Engage in strategic warfare with physics-based cannon projectiles that follow realistic ballistic trajectories, providing an immersive and challenging combat experience.


⛵Sail and Rigging System: The dynamic sails can be freely rolled up and down, the direction of the sails can be adjusted, and the wind force effect can be regulated. The dynamically calculated rigging system with physics provides a highly convincing portrayal of sail control. It does not utilize the built-in physics system but instead implements a relatively simplified physics calculation, making it very efficient and capable of supporting large-scale rigging displays.You can further design gameplay based on this system that affects the ship's propulsion through the interaction of wind and sails.


🤖AI Behavior Tree System:Challenge your players with intelligent AI opponents driven by an advanced Behavior Tree System. Watch as AI adversaries pursue and engage players dynamically, launching cannon fire strategically and adapting to changing circumstances. The result is an unpredictable and thrilling naval battle experience.


🔥Dynamic Effects and Realism:Experience the power of dynamic water effects, where ships create waves, foam, splashes, and ripples as they navigate the open sea. Cannon fire produces visual and auditory effects, adding an extra layer of realism to every engagement.


🖥️📱Cross-Platform Support:Effortlessly deploy your naval warfare simulations on both desktops and mobile platforms. Benefit from efficient performance optimization, ensuring a smooth and immersive experience for players across a variety of devices.


🌐Visualization and Scenes:Keep players engaged with dynamically updating health bars based on damage values, providing instant feedback on the intensity of naval engagements. Choose from pre-built sailing scenes or set the stage for thrilling AI battles, showcasing the versatility of the Naval Battle Kit.


Next version main feature:

Sea monster attack.


Asset uses:

1.fluid-behavior-tree under MIT License;

2.EventBetter under MIT License;

3.Colonial Ship under Asset Store EULA License;

4.Particle Pack under Asset Store EULA License;

5.Unity Terrain - URP Demo Scene under Asset Store EULA License;

6.AllSky Free under Asset Store EULA License;

see Third-Party Notices.txt file in package for details.


Embark on a journey into the heart of naval warfare with the Naval Battle Kit, where each wave, cannon blast, and strategic decision is a testament to the unparalleled realism and versatility of this comprehensive asset. Elevate your Unity projects and deliver an immersive maritime experience like never before.

results.title: Iskariot Judge
results.excerpt: Types of materials and texture maps: standard/default ... judge saw blade rotation attack ... This concerns assets of NatureManufacture (trees, ground), LuxWater (water) and AllSky (skybox).

raw.ec_description:
Number of textures: 10

Texture size: 2048 x 2048 px (rusted metal), 1024 x 1024 px (saw blade)

Polygon count: 45,773

Number of meshes (FBX): 1

Number of prefabs: 2

Rigging: Yes

Animation count: 10

Types of materials and texture maps: standard/default

Iskariot Judge

War Robot, with armature and 10 basic animations


The Iskariot Judge is one of Lonely Worlds three ancient War Robots. Including animations and fully rigged. There are two prefabs: one with an old rusted Judge and one with this model in its original colours. The ingame size is: height: 4.20 meters, width: 2.75 meters, length: 7.55 meters


As far as we are concerned, the rusted version of this model is especially intended for setting in a desolate, post-apocalytic world. As an unhinged and still dangerous witness to the very last war that transformed the earth into a lawless world. A beautiful robot that can be used as an enemy, guard or as a fellow combatant in a game. But possibly also as a motionless relic from a long forgotten war, left behind in a desolate environment. However, it is of course entirely up to you what you will use this asset for.


Included animations

The Judge features 10 basic animations:

judge idle

judge fatal hit 1

judge fatal hit 2

judge fatal hit 3

judge saw arm swing

judge walk backwards

judge walkplus arm swing

judge walk

judge saw blade rotation idle

judge saw blade rotation attack


However, this model is equipped with a full armature. This 'bone structure' allows you to make animations for additional movements in Unity (see also: read me file).


This asset contains:

1 Rigged FBX file

2 Prefabs (one rusted and one brand new Judge)

1 Demo scene

2 'Idle' Animator Controllers for the demo scene

10 Basic Animations

12 Materials

10 textures

2 Basic sound files (idle and walking)

1 Read me file (PDF)



Please note: some images or parts of the demo video above show assets from other developers. We used those assets just to give our robot an appropriate visual context. This concerns assets of NatureManufacture (trees, ground), LuxWater (water) and AllSky (skybox). Their assets, or parts of them, are NOT included. Shaders, buildings and the game character used in the video or images above are also NOT included.

As far as we are concerned, the rusted version of this model is especially intended for setting in a desolate, post-apocalytic world. As an unhinged and still dangerous witness to the very last war that transformed the earth into a lawless world. A beautiful robot that can be used as an enemy, guard or as a fellow combatant in a game. But possibly also as a motionless relic from a long forgotten war, left behind in a desolate environment. However, it is of course entirely up to you what you will use this asset for.


Included animations

The Executor features 9 basic animations:

canon_reset

optics_rotation-1

optics_rotation-2

walk

walkback

idle

die-1

die-2

die-3


However, this model is equipped with a full armature. This 'bone structure' allows you to make animations for additional movements in Unity (see also: read me file).


This asset contains:

1 Rigged FBX file

2 Prefabs (one rusted and one in the original color)

1 Demo scene

2 'Idle' Animator Controllers for the Demo Scene

9 Basic animations

8 Materials

4 textures

2 Basic sound files (Idle and Walking)

1 Read me file (PDF)



Please note: some images or parts of the demo video above show assets from other developers. We used those assets just to give our robot an appropriate visual context. This concerns assets of NatureManufacture (trees, ground), LuxWater (water) and AllSky (skybox). Their assets, or parts of them, are NOT included. Shaders, buildings and the game character used in the video or images above are also NOT included.

results.title: MS Vehicle System (free version)
results.excerpt: Scene controller, allowing you to get out and get into vehicles in a simple way. ... Controller for cameras, including 4 different modes of handling. ... Steering wheel system for the vehicle.

raw.ec_description:
'MS Vehicle System free version' is a simplified version of the asset 'MS Vehicle System', and contains:

• Scene controller, allowing you to get out and get into vehicles in a simple way.
• Automatic gears system for the vehicle.
• Controller for cameras, including 4 different modes of handling.
• Complete torque distribution system for the vehicle, allowing precise adjustment. • Brake system.
• Steering wheel system for the vehicle.
• Simple system of sounds for the vehicle, including brakes sounds, engine, beats.
• Simple system of skid marks.


-‘MS Vehicle System (free version)’ also includes a sample scene and includes 3 demonstration vehicles, which allows you to test all systems.
-The asset also comes with several pre-fabricated objects (prefabs), making it easy to use the system with objects already configured.

Asset 'MS Vehicle System': Link

Email: marcos11-24@hotmail.com

Galactic Green Skybox is a high quality green galactic themed skybox for your space games. Add this stunning high resolution, seamlessly stitched backdrop to give an atmospheric edge to your next project.

* Galactic Green Skybox Material
* Skybox features nebula, stars, galaxies, distant planets and space dust clouds
* 6 seamless 2048x2048 textures that can be resized if required
* High quality TIFF file format

Playable demo: Here

raw.ec_description:
Set of 10 Drift Type Tyres for your Drift Cars [Full Version Free Pack].


Lightweight tyres - every tyre has about 2-5k polygons and divided into Rims, Disc, Calliper and outer rubber protectors. Efficiently UV mapped. All tyre sets use the same outer rubber protectors.


Textures Dimensions are 1k with Diffuse and normal maps.


You can also inspect these tyres on our Support Website and pick and choose the ones you require.
